summary: Video set to music, color-graded teal and amber, letterboxed, with lens flares. A black SUV motorcade passes the Washington Monument at golden hour. It cuts to construction workers in hard hats lined up, with an 'MID-AMERICA' equipment trailer marked Atoka, OK. Trump in a long coat and red tie walks the line and poses centered with the workers, who give thumbs-up and smile. The clip ends on a black card with faint text reading 'President Donald...' The tweet reads 'Restoring the Reflecting Pool. Making D.C. beautiful again!'

script.scene: Wide shot, teal and amber color grade with lens flare: a black SUV motorcade rolls across an open plaza with the Washington Monument behind it at golden hour. Music, no speech.
Cut to a dimly lit lineup of bearded construction workers in hard hats and work shirts (caps, an 'America'-branded banner behind), standing shoulder to shoulder facing camera.
Low-angle shot of a figure in a dark long coat and suit (Trump) standing before the line of workers; their boots and jeans fill the frame beside a black Cadillac SUV. Dim toning.
Group shot in front of a 'MID-AMERICA / Atoka, OK' equipment trailer: Trump in red tie and dark coat stands centered, surrounded by the work crew giving thumbs-up and smiling.
Black end card with faint text (reads like 'President Donald...').

notable_text: Tweet: 'Restoring the Reflecting Pool. Making D.C. beautiful again!'
